note: Codified from the City of Round Rock Code of Ordinances (2018), Part III - Zoning and Development Code, Chapter 2 (Zoning Districts and Use Regulations), Sec. 2-26 Residential lot and building dimensional standards chart — Supplement 25, codified through Resolution No. R-2025-158 enacted June 26, 2025 (Municode ProductID 14610, job Id 492357). Source is Municode; all rows cite Sec. 2-26. MODELING NOTES: (1) The Round Rock Sec. 2-26 chart states 'Maximum height of principal building' in STORIES ('2.5 stories', '4 stories'), NOT feet, so max_height_ft is not_specified for every district (converting stories to feet would be fabrication) and carries 100 as a non-binding stand-in. (2) 'Minimum setback from street (ROW)' is codified as front_ft (Round Rock measures the front setback from the right-of-way). (3) The Sec. 2-26 chart has NO separate corner/street-side setback column, so side_corner_ft is not_specified and mirrors the base side setback. (4) 'Maximum lot coverage for buildings' (a building-coverage %) is codified as max_lot_coverage_pct; the chart states no separate impervious-cover cap, so max_impervious_pct is not_specified and carries 100. (5) The chart splits several districts into sub-type sub-columns (SF-2 Conventional/Zero Lot Line/Village; SF-3 Estate/Standard/Small Lot; TH Single-lot/Common-lot). Because a parcel's GIS zoningCode carries only the base code (e.g. 'SF-2') and cannot distinguish sub-types, exactly ONE base sub-variant per code is codified here (SF-2 = Conventional, SF-3 = Standard Lot, TH = Single-lot) to avoid an unresolvable leading-code collision in district mapping. (6) TF base side setback is stated '0 ft./5 ft.' (attached party-wall / detached side); the applicable non-zero minimum (5) is codified as side_ft and flagged. TH(Single) side is '5 ft./20 ft.' (interior / adjacent-to-street or -SF); the base interior 5 is codified and flagged. (7) AG (Agriculture) and SF-D (front setback stated 'Contextual', not a number) are EXCLUDED.
